title: Agentic Assurance Profile claim register
description: Schema for a claim register (default location `assurance/CLAIMS.yaml`). Each entry is a proposition asserted to a user, operator, integrator, auditor, or the public, with a proof tier, status, disclosure classification, and links to related invariants, defeaters, and residuals (PROFILE.md section 8). Claim wording must not exceed the support of its evidence tier.

id.description: Stable claim ID, independent of GitHub Issue numbers.

text.description: The exact user-facing or operator-facing claim.

scope.description: Bounded system and version scope of the claim.

proof_tier.description: Evidence-strength classification (PROFILE.md section 8): INDEPENDENTLY_VERIFIABLE (a third party can reproduce the result without privileged access), OPERATIONALLY_AUDITABLE (evidence exists but requires controlled access), OPERATOR_ATTESTED (the claim currently depends on operator process or statement), NOT_CLAIMED (the project explicitly declines to assert the property).

invariants.description: IDs of invariants supporting this claim.

evidence.description: Evidence references bound to a revision, release, artifact, or deployment.

defeaters.description: IDs of defeaters affecting this claim.

residuals.description: IDs of residuals affecting this claim.

owner.description: Named human owner of the claim.
